# Shidhartho Roy

> PhD student in Biomedical Engineering at Carnegie Mellon University. Research on EEG, near-infrared spectroscopy (NIRS / FD-NIRS), and physiological biomarkers of pain dysregulation — including pain in sickle cell disease and extended-reality paradigms for cognitive and sensory assessment.

Shidhartho Roy works on neuroimaging and biomedical signal processing: electroencephalography (EEG), frequency-domain near-infrared spectroscopy (FD-NIRS), machine learning for biomedical signals, and equitable optical sensing (e.g., the effect of melanin and Afro-textured hair on NIRS). He is based at Carnegie Mellon University (CMU) and previously researched medical image computing at Khulna University of Engineering and Technology.

## Profiles
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ExMye5IAAAAJ&hl=en): publications and citations
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Shidhartho-Roy?ev=hdr_xprf): research profile
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shidhartho/): professional profile
- [GitHub](https://github.com/royShidhartho): code and projects

## Site
- [Home / portfolio](https://royshidhartho.github.io/): bio, research, publications, talks, experience, education
- [Blog](https://royshidhartho.github.io/blog/): research updates and technical write-ups
- [CV (PDF)](https://royshidhartho.github.io/files/shidhartho-roy-cv.pdf): full curriculum vitae

## Research areas
- EEG-based biomarkers of pain dysregulation in sickle cell disease
- Extended reality (XR) paradigms for neurophysiology and pain research
- Frequency-domain near-infrared spectroscopy (FD-NIRS): cognitive load, oxygenation
- Equitable optical sensing: melanin- and hair-related bias in NIRS, optode design
- Medical image segmentation and machine learning

## Selected publications
- [Exploring the impact and influence of melanin on frequency-domain near-infrared spectroscopy measurements](https://doi.org/10.1117/1.JBO.29.S3.S33310): Journal of Biomedical Optics, 2024
- [EEG based stress analysis using rhythm specific spectral feature for video game play](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.compbiomed.2022.105849): Computers in Biology and Medicine, 2022
- [Metrics and enhancement strategies for grid resilience and reliability during natural disasters](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apenergy.2021.116709): Applied Energy, 2021
- [DRNet: Segmentation and localization of optic disc and Fovea from diabetic retinopathy image](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.artmed.2020.102001): Artificial Intelligence in Medicine, 2021
